text:
This system is a retrieval-augmented generation system.

It uses FastAPI for backend API.

It uses Qdrant for vector storage.

It uses Ollama for LLM inference.
FastAPI is a backend framework. Qdrant is a vector database. Ollama is a LLM runtime.
